title: YOPINSAND DIY Slime Kit, Galaxy Slime Making Kit for Girls, Glow in The Dark Slime with Add-ins, Foam Balls, Charms, Glitters, Party Favors Gift Toys for Kids 3-12
features: ALL in One Slime Kit: The Galaxy Slime Kit comes in a beautiful box and you can use the Clear Glue and Slime Activator to make any slime you want including Galaxy Slimes, Crystal Slimes, Butter Slimes and Glow in the Dark Slime also come with Foam balls, Mica Powder, Color Inks*4, Colorful Slices, Fishbowl Balls, Glitters, Glow in the Dark powder and star slices, Soft Clay, Container*5, Mixing Bowl, Stirrer and Measuring Cup. So many accessories to make Slime play more fun!
DIY Galaxy Making Kit:24-Piece Slime Kit including the amazing mix-ins, Perfect for girls to make their favorite fluffy butter slime and Galaxy slime creation.

Make Your Own Slime: Our slime making kit will bring endless fun to kids, and inspire your child's unlimited creativity to create a unique Slime, giving full play to children's imagination. Also comes with instructions, making it easy to make and allowing your child to learn while playing!

Perfect Slime Party Favors and Gifts: Suitable for a variety of occasions to give kids gifts and prizes, like Birthday presents, Christmas gifts and classroom prizes. It's always a perfect and attractive gift. This DIY slime kit is educational and meaningful for improving children's hands-on ability, creativity and imagination.
The slime kit is not recommended for children under 3 years of age and must be used under adult supervision.
description: Product Description Everything in One Kit! This galaxy slime making kit has everything you need to make the slime, including clear glue (350ML), and slime activator (100ML), containers for storage*5, bowls and stirrers for making the slime, Measuring Cup,and Color ink*4, and includes several decorations for making the galaxy slime, and soft clay! All in one box for all your slime-making needs! Lots of Accessories! Want to make the most beautiful looking galaxy slime ever? try multiple color mixes and multiple accessories and decorations! Package includes Colorful Slices, Fishbowl Balls, Glitters, Glow in the Dark powder and star slices, Soft Clay. Dare to experiment and create with your imagination, you can make the best work! Slime Party With Friends Slimes are perfect for parties and other occasions for kids to share and play with. Kids can compete with friends to see who can make the most beautiful slime, and at the same time, it can enhance children's communication and socialization skills, and improve their friendship. Once finished, slime can be stored in the container for a long time. Tips for making the Crystal Slime: Slime Activator:Put the Slime Activator into the bottle and fill the bottle with water, and then Screw the cap and well mix it. How to Mix:Measure 30ml of the Glue with 8 drops(8ml) of slime activator and stir vigorously for 1 minute. If it's poor molding. Add 2 more drops. Do not add all activator at once, adjust it to the molding situation Slime is sensory play when all the senses are stimulated at the same time, kids are able to learn through exploration and use their creativity in learning.
